nasb.text: And He got into one of the boats, which was Simon’s, and asked him to put out a little way from the land. And He sat down and began teaching the people from the boat.

esv.text: Getting into one of the boats, which was Simon’s, he asked him to put out a little from the land. And he sat down and taught the people from the boat.

cnv.text: 他上了西門的那一隻船，請他撐開，離岸不遠，就坐下，從船上教導眾人。

ccb.text: 就上了西门的那条船，请西门把船稍微划离岸边，然后坐在船上教导众人。

csbs.text: 有一条船是西门的，耶稣上去，请他把船划出去，稍微离岸。耶稣就坐下来，从船上教导众人。
